title: monardella odoratissima subsp. franciscana
intro: Monardella odoratissima subsp. franciscana, also known as Franciscan Mountain Monardella, is a flowering plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Franciscan Mountains in California. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Monardella odoratissima subsp. franciscana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
